name: Centeotl
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Centeotl golden maize-lord — sweetness lifted from soil to song.
flowText: Centeotl golden maize-lord — sweetness lifted from soil to song.

related.name: Brigid
related.teaser: Brigid is a bedrock of becoming — Hearth; under Sun; in Leo.

related.name: ♍ Virgo
related.teaser: Virgo is the wheat of Earth — patient harvester, discerning servant, keeper of order.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Ceres
related.teaser: Ceres embodies earth, grain, abundance — under Saturn · Venus; in Taurus, Virgo.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: Amber
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: Demeter
related.teaser: Demeter grain-mother — sorrow turned to harvest by returning steps.

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.

related.name: Danu
related.teaser: Danu embodies earth mother, nurture — under Venus · Saturn; in Taurus, Cancer.

related.name: Hathor
related.teaser: Hathor embodies earth mother, nurture — under Venus · Saturn; in Taurus, Cancer.

related.name: Isis
related.teaser: Isis embodies earth mother, nurture — under Venus · Saturn; in Taurus, Cancer.

related.name: Gaia
related.teaser: Gaia thick green syllable — the planet saying I am.
